title: Cobblemon Brewing For Battle
description: A Multiplayer-Focused Cobblemon experience filled to the brim with new Pokemon, QoL Features, and More!
body:
# Welcome To Cobblemon!

Not only is this pack filled with more pokemon than the base mod, thanks to additional packs like [AllTheMons](https://modrinth.com/datapack/allthemons/) and [Legendary Encounters](https://modrinth.com/datapack/legendary-encounters(cobblemon)), The world itself has been greatly overhauled from the traditional Vanilla biomes, allowing for far more interesting exploration as you go hunting for the perfect team!

Or, if you're planning on searching for legendaries, you can use Create to automate your pokeball manufacturing, ensuring you'll be properly prepared for any occasion!

This pack is best played alongside friends, as there's no gyms or NPCs to challenge in singleplayer. (Note: some of the client-side mods will likely need to be deleted from the server instance such as Better Clouds. I'll see about providing a server pack so this part is less tedious, but no guarantee)

Finally, do note this was first and foremost made for a personal server, but any and all are welcome to explore this particular flavor of Cobblemon! **Have fun, and catch 'em all!**
